summary: Iteration 99: Tested 3 new features - 1) Log Customer Reply endpoint, 2) AI suggest message em-dash removal, 3) Call screen routing. All backend tests PASSED. All frontend features VERIFIED working.

log_reply_endpoint.verification: Returns 200 with event_type='customer_reply', direction='inbound', title='Customer Reply'

ai_suggest_message.verification: Returns 200 with suggestion field containing clean text
ai_suggest_message.em_dash_check: VERIFIED - No em-dashes (U+2014) in response: 'Forest, thanks for your reply! Also saw you opened the birthday card, hope it hit the mark. Want me to help Mike set up a quick time to look at cars?'

elements_verified: 'Call will be logged to the activity feed' message
call_screen_routing.code_verification: handleQuickAction('call') at line 627-629 routes to /call-screen instead of tel:

green_log_customer_reply_button.elements_after_click: Input field for paste/type, close button visible

orange_arrow_undo_button.location: Bottom composer toolbar (between blue + and purple sparkles)
orange_arrow_undo_button.click_behavior: Opens same inline Log Reply composer

sms_email_toggle.verification: SMS and Email buttons visible, clickable, mode switches correctly

composer_send_button.verification: Green send arrow visible for SMS mode, purple for Email mode

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 99 verified: 1) Log Reply endpoint works and logs customer replies to activity feed, 2) AI suggest message removes em-dashes via post-processing in contact_intel.py lines 336-338, 3) Call button routes to /call-screen page for duration logging instead of direct tel: link. Twilio SMS is MOCKED.

mocked_api.twilio_sms: MOCKED - Personal SMS flow opens native SMS app instead of sending via Twilio
